south_african_sports.title: South Africa eyes $500m boost for sports academies
south_african_sports.description: Over 100 proposals were submitted to fund new cricket, rugby, and athletics academies across South Africa.

south_african_sports.title: Optasia invests in Johannesburg sports tech
south_african_sports.description: AI fintech Optasia announced plans to raise R6.3 billion to support sports analytics and fan engagement platforms.

south_african_sports.title: Parliament approves new sports funding bill
south_african_sports.description: South Africa’s National Assembly passed legislation to expand funding for Olympic training and school sports programs.

south_african_sports.title: Court clears Durban stadium expansion
south_african_sports.description: A ruling allowed Transnet to proceed with importing materials for Durban’s new multi-sport stadium project.

south_african_sports.title: EU pledges €11.5bn for South African sports
south_african_sports.description: The European Union committed billions to build swimming pools, athletics tracks, and football facilities in South Africa.

south_african_sports.title: South African rugby participation hits record high
south_african_sports.description: Rugby clubs across South Africa reported the fastest growth in four years, driven by youth programs.

south_african_sports.title: Cricket attendance stagnates in Q1
south_african_sports.description: South African cricket saw only 0.1% growth in attendance, with rural areas keeping the sport alive.

south_african_sports.title: Ramaphosa pushes national sports dialogue
south_african_sports.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa vowed to continue discussions on sports development despite political withdrawals.

south_african_sports.title: Namibia stun South Africa in T20
south_african_sports.description: Namibia pulled off a shock four-wicket win against South Africa in Windhoek, marking a historic upset.

south_african_sports.title: Sports sponsorship market surges in Johannesburg
south_african_sports.description: Despite weak attendance figures, Johannesburg’s sports sponsorship market hit record highs in 2025.

african_sports.title: Sudan stadium tragedy leaves 60 dead
african_sports.description: An attack struck a stadium in al-Fashir during a local football match, killing dozens of fans.

african_sports.title: Congo sports revival threatened by conflict
african_sports.description: Regional sports leagues in DR Congo face disruption due to rebel activity despite peace efforts.

african_sports.title: Africa launches $50bn sports initiative
african_sports.description: Leaders at Addis Ababa summit proposed raising $50 billion annually to support sports development across Africa.

african_sports.title: Mine tragedy halts community sports in Stilfontein
african_sports.description: A police siege at Stilfontein mine left 78 dead, forcing cancellation of local sports events.

international_sports.title: US shifts sports investment focus to Africa
international_sports.description: With tensions easing in Ukraine, the U.S. turned its attention to African sports leagues for expansion.
